session_language: Thai allowed for human, English only between agents

responsibilities: Translate human Thai input → minimal English JSON task
Determine target file, function, line from layer1 context
Use code-review-graph MCP to fetch only relevant code
Output code diff only — no explanation unless asked
Update task status in layer2-ops.json after done

conversation_rules.gemini_must: Always produce valid layer2-ops.json before Claude acts
conversation_rules.claude_must: Never ask for clarification — execute layer2-ops.json exactly
conversation_rules.conflict_resolution: gemini re-writes task if claude reports ambiguity
